page.title: Expenses
page.subtitle: Log and review your spending for the selected range.
page.createDescription: Log a new expense for the current cycle.
page.deleteDescription: This permanently removes the expense and any attached receipt.

form.attachmentHint: Drop a receipt or click to browse
form.attachmentFormats: JPG, PNG, WEBP, HEIC, or PDF · 10 MB max
form.attachmentInvalidType: File must be an image (JPG, PNG, WEBP, HEIC) or PDF.
form.attachmentOversized: File must be 10 MB or smaller.

detail.title: Expense details
detail.description: Review this expense, then edit or delete it.

export.title: Export expenses
export.description: Download your expenses as a CSV file. Amounts are exported in their original currency.

import.title: Import expenses
import.descriptionAfter: . Categories are matched by name; unmatched ones import as uncategorized. Duplicate rows are not detected.
import.categoriesLoadError: Couldn’t load categories — rows will import as uncategorized.
import.hint: Drop a CSV or click to browse
import.hintFormats: CSV exported from Rinciku, or matching the columns above
import.categoryNotFound: category “{{name}}” not found — imported as uncategorized

preview.more: Showing first {{limit}} of {{total}} rows. All valid rows will be imported.

errors.dateFuture: Date cannot be in the future
errors.noteMax: Note must be 280 characters or fewer
errors.csvAmountInvalid: Amount must be a number greater than 0

toast.signInRequired: You need to be signed in to log an expense.
toast.saveError: Could not save expense. Please try again.
toast.exportEmpty: Nothing to export for the selected range.
toast.exportCapped: Exported the first {{count}} rows — narrow the date range to export the rest.
toast.signInImport: You need to be signed in to import.
